title: asplenium adiantum-nigrum subsp. yuanum
intro: Asplenium adiantum-nigrum subsp. yuanum is a subspecies of the Asplenium adiantum-nigrum fern, a type of vascular plant native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Asplenium adiantum-nigrum subsp. yuanum include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and processed into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
